title: eurybia glandulosa
intro: Eurybia glandulosa is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family, native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oil and other bioactive compounds. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and soothing digestive issues. Eurybia glandulosa is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically in the form of a salve or ointment to harness its medicinal properties.
